description: Canonical channel names for a multi-channel `sampleArray` on a `type: "location"` Measurement (SPEC §4.3/§4.5, OB-13 — the "location channel convention" the spec's measurement-type registry section names). `lat`/`lon`/`alt` were already in informal use (see the SPEC.md worked example); `speed`/`course` are added here for full GPS-track producers. A channel's `unit` still lives on the channel object itself (§4.3) — this file only canonicalizes the `name`.

tokens.label: Speed
tokens.description: Instantaneous ground speed. Recommended unit: m/s.

tokens.label: Course (Heading)
tokens.description: Direction of travel. Recommended unit: deg.
